newsArchive.headline: GM FOOD FAIRE
newsArchive.body:
Savannah, GA - The genetic foods industry staged a major event here yesterday to showcase its upcoming products. Over thirty companies set up booths and gave talks to wide-eyed onlookers.

One such corporation, DNA Meals, presented their product, "Overlord Beans", during an afternoon PowerPoint presentation. According to the public relations representative speaking, this amazing new product actually causes a person to slowly attain their optimum weight with repeated use.

Spokespeople for the GM corporations were universal in their dismissal of the criticism which often follows the industry. One in particular said, "Look, these products are safe. That thing about the guy speaking in tongues and worshiping Satan is just a load of garbage. Would we stake the reputation of our company on unsafe products? No. That's just ridiculous. I mean, sure companies have put unsafe products out, but the GM industry operates at a higher ethical standard. That goes without saying."
